public_date_basis: manual_source_link:Future Of Mankind Contact Report 150 English translation page
claim_normalized: Approximately on the 15th of August 1982, southern Italy will again be struck by an earthquake, for this part of Italy will not rest for some time.

public_date_basis: manual_source_link:Future Of Mankind Contact Report 242 English translation page
claim_normalized: With smaller quakes, however, things will be different, because already on the 8th of May another one of these will occur, which will have to be calculated at a magnitude of about 5.5, if, according to the Richter scale ….

public_date_basis: manual_source_link:Future Of Mankind Contact Report 369 English translation page
claim_normalized: Unfortunately, the brute force of the two seaquakes will lead to further quakes, because every seaquake and landquake always causes further quakes worldwide as a chain reaction, especially when such large quakes occur as will be the case in the Indian Ocean on the 26th of December.

public_date_basis: manual_source_link:Future Of Mankind Contact Report 436 English translation page
claim_normalized: This is indeed the case because we are doing a small study on seaquakes and earthquakes, and they are related to a major seaquake of magnitude 8.1 that will occur on the 15th of November near the Kuril Islands north of Japan.

public_date_basis: manual_source_link:Future Of Mankind Contact Report 441 English translation page
claim_normalized: Firstly, the bird epidemic will be back in the news again, in England, where the disease has already broken out in a turkey farm.
